segments.text: Different ways to say 'Father' across Indian states.
Appa in Karnataka, Achan in Kerala, Baba in Maharashtra and Bengal.
Nanna in Telangana, Thanthai in Tamil Nadu, Deuta in Assam.
Manipur: Ipa, Meghalaya: Pa, Nagaland: Apo, Goa: Pai or Bapui.
UP, MP, and Haryana commonly use Papa, Pitaji, or Daddy.
